title: AdvancedToolTip
description: A Simple mod thats adds advanced tooltip
body:
A Mod that adds advanced tooltip when f3 and H is pressed and you can always see how much percent your tool has left and you have many many more debug info for testing or just for knowing how much percente durability your sword or armor has.
It adds:
Many debug info.
How much durability an item has.
And many more features.
